message:
Add contract tests for manifest refresh and NTM naming

Setup routes tests (bd-1jdm):
- Add POST /setup/registry/refresh endpoint contract test
- Verify canonical envelope format (object: "registry_refresh")
- Test manifest metadata validation (schemaVersion, source, generatedAt)
- Assert toolCount is non-negative number
- Add refreshedAt timestamp validation

NTM naming tests (bd-4udr):
- Add comprehensive tests for deterministic NTM naming functions
- Test extractProjectName for Unix paths edge cases
- Test generateNtmSessionName collision avoidance
- Test parseNtmSessionName round-trip consistency
- Test createAgentNtmMapping traceability
- Add structured logging assertions for mapping resolution

These tests ensure Gateway ↔ NTM correlation is deterministic
and that registry refresh follows the canonical API envelope format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-1hac","title":"ACFS tool registry integration","description":"Background:
- Gateway setup/detection currently hardcodes tool lists and install metadata.
- ACFS (agentic_coding_flywheel_setup) now owns the canonical manifest + checksums for the stack.

Goal:
- Make ACFS manifest the single source of truth for tool metadata in this public gateway repo.

Scope:
- Define mapping types, loader, registry service, and integrate into setup/detection endpoints.

Non-goals:
- Do not embed any private infrastructure or business content.
- Do not implement installers; only surface metadata + commands.

Why this matters:
- Reduces drift across repos, keeps UI and detection in lockstep, and centralizes tool inventory decisions.

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Unit/integration: bd-1rdc, bd-6huy, bd-1kkl.
- Contract: bd-2lvp, bd-1jdm.
- E2E: bd-1uog.
- Harness: bd-a1jg.

Definition of Done:
- /setup endpoints and detection use registry-driven metadata.
- Readiness output aligns with manifest and is auditable via provenance fields.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:36.404946939Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T06:23:52.711481533Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acfs","integration","registry"]}
